Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bastion's Shadow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Bastion’s Shadow is a ship with a closed eye on top of its mast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Bastion's Shadow is a location with a beach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Bastion’s Shadow is a ship that can sail through Bastion’s Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart affected the Consultants on Bastion's Shadow after two days of exposure.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Bastion's Shadow is something that has been prepared to hold Guild members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Bastion's Shadow is a hold used for retreat.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bastion’s Shadow is a ship sailing behind others in the fleet.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bastion’s Shadow is a Consultant ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bastion’s Shadow is a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bastion’s Shadow has a captain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
